name: ai-blog-converter
description: Convert HTML documentation to Markdown and generate static site

scripts.build: node src/convert_md_to_html_pandoc.js && node src/generate_index_with_dates.js && node src/generate_sitemap.js && node src/generate_overview.js
scripts.clean: node src/clean.js docs pages sitemap.xml overview.html

author: AI Note Developer
